characters.name: Adam
characters.description: AdamProduct InformationFirst EpisodeBe MineVoice byN/AGeneral InformationGenderMaleSpeciesHumanAge16 (Probably)Personal InformationResidenceSunny BayFriendsSkatersLove InterestsLyna(crush)LikesGoing to the park to skateProfessional StatusOccupationSkater Adamis a skater, and a background character inLolirock. Nothing is known about him other than that he is a skater and he likesLyna. Adam has light brown hair, and has blue eyes. He usually wears a yellow shirt with a white outline, and an aqua green hoodie jacket with a silver bracelet and dark purple watch, dark blue pants, and camo green and white sneakers.

characters.name: Amaru
characters.description: AmaruAmaruPegasus AmaruVoice ActorsFrenchTabitha St. GermainEnglishDee Bradley Baker (pilot)Tabitha St. GermainCharacteristicsSpeciesEphedian (Dog/Cat hybrid)Pegasus (once transformed)Weapon(s)Hoofs and teethGenderMaleAgeUnknownStatusAliveProfessional StatusKingdomVoltaAffiliation(s)LoliRockOccupation(s)LoliRock's magical petTransformation ObjectNonverbal into pegasus form at willPersonal StatusRelative(s)Unknown Ephedian animalsFriend(s)IrisSnowflakeTaliaAurianaCarissaLynaAlliesLoliRockThe ResistanceEnemiesBanesPraxinaMephisto(presumed deceased)Gramorr(deceased)MediaFirst Appearance"To Find a Princess"Last Appearance"TBD" Amaruis anEphediancreature with the ability to change into a Pegasus. Sometimes, he rolls like a hedgehog to dodge magic spells. Amaru can also control magic. CuteAmaruis a small, furry dog-like cat creature with purple and white fur with dark blue hair, green eyes, a green and gold gem jewelry in his neck level, and a little fuzzy tail. He uses his green gem to transform into his Pegasus form, which resembles a purple and white furry horse with a blue mane, a small nose, a blue tail put in a ponytail on his rear and translucent periwinkle wings.

characters.name: Aunt Ellen
characters.description: ElliraAunt EllenElliraEllira MaskedAliasEllenVoice ActorsFrenchMagali RosenzweigEnglishTabitha St. GermainCharacteristicsSpeciesEphedianWeapon(s)RingsGenderFemaleAge50(Earth years)[1]150(Ephedian years)StatusAliveProfessional StatusKingdomEphediaAffiliation(s)EphediaSunny BayOccupation(s)Royal GuardPersonal StatusRelative(s)Iris(adopted niece)UnknownFriend(s)Queen of EphediaKing of EphediaAurianaTaliaCarissaLynaIziraJodanEnemiesGramorr(deceased)Mephisto(presumably deceased)PraxinaMediaFirst AppearanceTo Find a PrincessLast AppearanceCrowning Glory: Part 2 Ellira, better known asAunt Ellen, is a supporting character who appears inLoliRock. She is a member of theEphedianroyal guard, entrusted by theQueen of Ephediawith the responsibility of raisingIrisand protecting her fromGramorr. Following the queen's orders, she kept her true identity a secret until the episode "Truth Be Told," where Iris uncovered the truth. Later in "Crowning Glory: Part 1", Iris revealed toTaliaandAurianathat she is also an Ephedian. Iris, Auriana, and Talia all live at herhouseonEarth. As Aunt Ellen she appears to be fair-skinned overweight middle-aged woman.She has shoulder-length curly ginger-brown hair, olive-green eyes, and freckles on her cheeks. Her typical outfit includes a burgundy cardigan over a lime-green top, paired with khaki jeggings, brown wedge heels, pearl earrings, and a necklace with red, orange, and purple beads. She also wears a black watch on her left wrist and a gold bracelet on her right.

characters.name: Auriana
characters.description: AurianaCasualMagical DressDark Auriana From [lDancing ShoesTitlePrincess of VoltaVoice ActorsFrenchLéopoldine SerreEnglishHynden Walch (pilot)Tabitha St. GermainCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanEphedianWeapon(s)Ribbon of VoltaGenderFemaleAge15(Earth years)[1]45(Ephedian years)StatusAliveProfessional StatusKingdomVoltaAffiliation(s)LoliRockResistanceOccupation(s)PrincessSongwriterDancerMusicianTransformation ObjectRingPersonal StatusRelative(s)King Mike(father)Queen Janette(mother)Jodan(older brother)Unnamed 32 younger sistersUnnamed grandmotherFriend(s)IrisTaliaCarissaLynaAmaruIziraAunt EllenNathanielDougMephisto(sometimes, former crush while under spell)CarlosMatt(former crush)Timothy(former crush)EnemiesGramorr(deceased)Mephisto(presumably deceased)PraxinaDeinos and KakosMediaFirst AppearanceTo Find a PrincessLast AppearanceCrowning Glory: Part 2 PrincessAurianaof Volta is a main character inLoliRock. She is the exiled princess ofVoltaand a member of the bandLoliRock. She fights to help freeEphediafromGramorr's control, alongside her friends and fellow princesses Iris, Talia, Lyna, and Carissa. She traveled to Earth with Talia to search for the lost princess of Ephedia, Iris. After locating her in the city of Sunny Bay, she began living with Talia and Iris inAunt Ellen's house. There, she and Talia taught Iris about their home planet and magic while performing concerts for their band and protecting Earth from Gramorr and his minions.

characters.name: Avery
characters.description: AveryCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAge13-17Personal StatusRelative(s)Unnamed GrandmotherMissy Robins(cousin)Friend(s)IrisTaliaAurianaMissy RobinsMediaFirst Appearance"Puppylove"Averyis a minor character who debuts in "Puppylove".  Avery has curly, short ginger-brown hair and dark blue eyes. She has light skin and a heart-shaped face much like Iris, and has a relatively curvier physique compared to her cousin. She wears red lipstick and 2 heart-shaped dark fuchsia earrings. She wears a lavender ruffled tank top and a black V-necked undershirt, blue jean shorts and brown sandals. She also has a pale beige hat with a purple ribbon and 2 white bracelets and a fuchsia one at her right hand, and a single white bracelet on her left.

characters.name: Banes
characters.description: BanesCharacteristicsSpeciesReddish-Black PantherWeapon(s)Fangs and clawsGenderMaleAgeUnknownStatusAliveProfessional StatusAffiliation(s)Gramorr(formerly)PraxinaOccupation(s)Minion(Possibly secret evil master)Personal StatusAlliesGramorr(former master; deceased)Mephisto(presumably deceased)PraxinaMediaFirst AppearanceTo Find a PrincessLast AppearanceTBD Banesis a mysterious black panther companion ofLord Gramorr. Gramorr loves to talk to him even though he at first seems to be just a faithful and fiercely loyal pet. Gramorr also has a habit of apologizing to Banes whenever things go wrong or got delayed. The pair seem to be connected in some way. It seems to have a link tothe maskhe wore, as Banes presents its broken half to Praxina. Wherever Gramorr goes, he is followed by Banes, an evil black Panther... As for his master, Banes is a force to be reckoned with.

characters.name: Belina
characters.description: BelinaVoice ActorsFrenchClaire BouanichEnglishAshleigh BallCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleProfessional StatusKingdomN/AOccupation(s)N/APersonal StatusRelative(s)N/AFriend(s)RoseOliviaTaliaMediaFirst AppearanceStep Right UpBelinais a minor character inLoliRockthat only made an appearance in "Step Right Up. Belina has long luscious brown hair into a ponytail over a thick purple hair tie with yellow bubble pieces, green emerald eyes that wore a very dark violet glasses, very dark desaturated pink sleeveless dress with grayish purple waist ribbon, mostly desaturated dark lime green middle-sleeved and hooded open jacket with white trim on inside of the hood, and dark grayish blue boots with purple trim on top to bottom. In bedtime, she wore a pale yellow pajama shirt with pocket on the heart, pink triple buttons and trim on the bottom sleeves, matching pale yellow pajama pants with matching pink trim on the bottom, and dark moderate red slippers with dark moderate pink trim on top.

characters.name: Black Crystal Summoners
characters.description: TheBlack Crystal Summonersare Ephedians who uses their magics for evil. The greatest of them isGramorr, who was able to take over the entire planet ofEphedia. Just like theMagical Princesses, they can use crystal magic and bend them to their will. The crystals that they can manipulate were mostly dark but with some tint of the users signature color likePraxina's red andMephisto's green colors. Unique to the Black Crystal Summoners is their ability to conjureBlack Crystal Monsterseither through mutation of things, animals from bothEarthandEphediaor summoning them out of nowhere. The black crystal magic function like crystal magic does built is stated that an individual hit by this magic can receive strain on their bodies as it contains strong negative energies.

characters.name: Carissa
characters.description: CarissaCasualMagical DressResistance CloakTitlePrincess of CalixVoice ActorsFrenchFanny BlocEnglishTabitha St. GermainCharacteristicsSpeciesEphedianWeapon(s)Clubs of CalixGenderFemaleAge15 (Earth years)[1]45 (Ephedian years)StatusAliveProfessional StatusKingdomCalixAffiliation(s)ResistanceLoliRockOccupation(s)PrincessTransformation ObjectBraceletPersonal StatusRelative(s)King and Queen of Calix (parents)Unnamed younger brotherFriend(s)IziraLynaIrisTaliaAurianaAmaruAunt EllenEnemiesGramorr(deceased)Mephisto(presumably deceased)PraxinaMediaFirst AppearanceHome Part ILast AppearanceTBDPrincessCarissaof Calix is a supporting character who appears inLoliRock. She is one of the founding members ofThe Resistance, alongsideIziraandLyna. She is the princess of the realmCalix. Her magic gem color is purple, and her motif is a sparkling star. Her transformation item is anarm bracelet. A skilled warrior princess, Carissa excels in hand-to-hand combat and battle-oriented spells. She wields theClubs of Calix, a pair of powerful clubs that enhance her fighting and magical abilities. Carissa has fair skin, bright blue eyes, and coral-pink lips. She has waist-length ginger hair, which she keeps tied in a loose French braid draped over her right shoulder and secured with a black hair tie. She wears a purple halter top with black stripes along the hemline, paired with light blue denim short shorts and brown fringe boots with a folded cuff. She wears a gold arm bracelet with a dark purple sparkling star on her upper left arm.

characters.name: Carlos
characters.description: CarlosVoice ActorsFrenchYoann Bellot SoverEnglishDavid KayeCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAgeAround 15-17Professional StatusOccupation(s)DesignerPersonal StatusRelative(s)Unnamed grandmotherFriend(s)Auriana,Talia,IrisMediaFirst AppearanceStitchesCarlos Montanais a young designer that appears in "Stitches". He learned from a young age from his grandmother who was his inspiration. Also revealed,Aurianahad a slight bit of a crush on Carlos which was also revealed in Stitches. InStitches, Carlos is revealed to have taughtAurianahow to sew, helping her become capable of sewing entire shirts and dresses in only a few days. He and Auriana both present their clothing collections at the Sunny Bay fashion show. InSmart, Carlos is called by Iris, who tells him how to get free tickets for a Lolirock concert. He follows her instructions by going to Doug’s blog website, and is one of the people that causes the phone to crash so the monster using it will short-circuit.

characters.name: Clara
characters.description: ClaraVoice ActorsFrenchEmmylou HomsEnglishNatasha CalisCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAge5Professional StatusOccupation(s)Contestant of the flower competitionPersonal StatusFriend(s)IrisTaliaAurianaNathanielMediaFirst AppearanceFlower PowerClarais a competitor in the 16th annual Sunny Bay flower competition. She first debuted inFlower Power. Clara has short, bright brown hair cut into a bob style and bright blue eyes. She wears a white headband adorned with three mint green flowers. She has a knee-length blue-green dress that has a pink collar, a pink ribbon with a bow in the back, and a bright yellow circular adornment topped by a purple heart with a golden outline. Her shoes are a pair of lavender mary janes. Clara can be emotional in a way that's common for her age. She has an interest in flowers and gardening. She is a grateful person who holds a great appreciation for those who are kind to her.

characters.name: Daisy
characters.description: DaisyProduct InformationFirst EpisodeCamp PrincessVoice byClaire Corlett (English)Claire Quilichini (French)General InformationGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanAge6Personal InformationResidenceSunny BayFriendsIrisTaliaAurianaProfessional StatusOccupationCamper Daisyis a girl who debuts inCamp Princess. InCamp Princess, Daisy watches a video of a Lolirock concert with her fellow campers and her chaperones,Iris,Talia, andAuriana. She asks them to show her and her fellow campers a few dance moves, and Iris and her friends do the final poses of their song. The campers (including Daisy) mimick them, but start striking odd poses when they see Talia trying to swat a mosquito and mistake it for dancing. Later, two campers taunt Daisy for being scared of the dark as she hides from them in a tree. Iris, Talia, and Auriana find them, and the bullies run away. Daisy comes down and explains that while she has plenty of badges, she is too afraid to sleep outside because she’s afraid of the dark. Iris and her friends offer to spend the night with her, and she excitedly accepts the offer.

characters.name: Debra Harrison
characters.description: Debra HarrisonCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAge17-18StatusAliveProfessional StatusOccupation(s)ArtistPersonal StatusRelative(s)Unnamed grandfatherJack Harrison(great-grandfather)Friend(s)IrisTaliaAurianaMediaFirst AppearanceThe Ruby of the OrientDebra Harrisonis a minor character who debuts in "The Ruby of the Orient". In "The Ruby of the Orient", Debra showsNathanielthree sample menus she made for his smoothie bar.Iris,Talia, andAurianaenter the bar and walk over to them. Nathaniel notices them, and calls Iris over to see which menu she prefers. Nathaniel begins to introduce them to Debra, but she interrupts him and explains that she is familiar with Lolirock. Nathaniel then introduces Debra to Iris, Talia, and Auriana, adding that she is the best artist in town. Auriana asks if Debra could make promotional art for their band, and Debra enthusiastically agrees. Debra asks what kind of look they want for the art, and Auriana asks for her to try to tie together something with kittens, mini golf, and a Voltan marmoset. Talia shoots down the idea at once and asks instead for something that says Lolirock. Debra asks them to stop by her house in the afternoon to see her designs.

characters.name: Debra Harrison
characters.description: Debra HarrisonCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAge17-18StatusAliveProfessional StatusOccupation(s)ArtistPersonal StatusRelative(s)Unnamed grandfatherJack Harrison(great-grandfather)Friend(s)IrisTaliaAurianaMediaFirst AppearanceThe Ruby of the OrientDebra Harrisonis a minor character who debuts in "The Ruby of the Orient". In "The Ruby of the Orient", Debra showsNathanielthree sample menus she made for his smoothie bar.Iris,Talia, andAurianaenter the bar and walk over to them. Nathaniel notices them, and calls Iris over to see which menu she prefers. Nathaniel begins to introduce them to Debra, but she interrupts him and explains that she is familiar with Lolirock. Nathaniel then introduces Debra to Iris, Talia, and Auriana, adding that she is the best artist in town. Auriana asks if Debra could make promotional art for their band, and Debra enthusiastically agrees. Debra asks what kind of look they want for the art, and Auriana asks for her to try to tie together something with kittens, mini golf, and a Voltan marmoset. Talia shoots down the idea at once and asks instead for something that says Lolirock. Debra asks them to stop by her house in the afternoon to see her designs.

characters.name: Deinos and Kakos
characters.description: Deinos and KakosVoice ActorsFrenchEmmanuel GarijoEnglishSamuel VincentCharacteristicsSpeciesEphedianGenderMaleAgeAround 15-17[1](Estimation)Professional StatusKingdomUnknownOccupation(s)Temporarily worked forGramorrPersonal StatusEnemiesIris,Talia,AurianaMediaFirst AppearanceRaffle BaffleDeinos and KakosareGramorr's (short-lived) evil twin replacements ofMephistoandPraxina. They only appear in the episode, "Raffle Baffle", pursuing the girls. Deinos' signature color is gray-blue while Kakos's is yellow. The two are much more fearsome than Praxina and Mephisto because they are more coordinated. Deinos begins every spell and Kakos finishes them. Since they are identical twins, both brothers sport a brush-up hair and tan skin. Deinos' costume is black with blue highlights while Kakos has yellow. Both brothers were proud of their skills and were not shy to brag about. They can be ruthless and shows less emotion than Praxina and Mephisto. They are so in sync that they even finish each other's sentences.

characters.name: Doug
characters.description: DougProduct InformationFirst EpisodeSing For MeLatest EpisodeCrowning Glory: Part 2Voice byJulien Crampon(French)James Kirk(English)Saar Badishi(Hebrew)General InformationGenderMaleSpeciesHumanAge15[1]Personal InformationResidenceSunny BayFriendsNathanielIrisAurianaTaliaLove InterestsAuriana (possibly)LikesAll new information of LoliRockHis phoneHelping othersDislikesLosing his phoneProfessional StatusAffiliationsLoliRockOccupationBloggerAudience member of theLoliRockbandObjectsPhone Dougis a recurring character inLoliRock. He is a big fan of the LoliRock band and writes a blog about them. His first appearance is in episodeBatty. He has an average height likeNathanieland has blond hair and hazel brown eyes. Doug borders on the fanatic. He likes gushing over the different things and happenings aboutLoliRock. Doug also appears to be gullible sometimes due to his innocence. Unknowingly, he sometimes annoys Nathaniel whenever he bursts in a conversation between him andIris. Despite his obsession forLoliRockand his phone, he's always there to help others as well.

characters.name: Ella
characters.description: EllaVoice ActorsEnglishErika Shaye GairCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderFemalePersonal StatusRelative(s)Unnamed FatherFriend(s)Iris,Talia,Auriana,NathanielMediaFirst AppearanceThe HauntingEllais a girl who, together with her dad, moved to a haunted house. Ella has auburn hair, brown eyes, and fair skin. She wears a shirt with striped, short sleeves, and has two heart-shaped cherries on it. The background for the pain piece of her shirt is navy blue and her sleeves contain red stripes. She also wears blue glasses, light blue jeans, and sneakers.

characters.name: Evan
characters.description: EvanProduct InformationFirst EpisodeI Want My LTVLatest EpisodeI Want My LTVGeneral InformationGenderMaleSpeciesHumanAge7-9Personal InformationRelativesUnnamed motherUnnamed fatherUnnamed sister Evanis a boy who debuts inI Want My LTV. InI Want My LTV, Evan is sleeping in his mom’s car while she drives them to an unspecified location when a burning tree falls in front of them, causing her to swerve. The car ends up teetering off the edge of a cliff, but he escapes. After a while, he manages to get Iris, Talia, and Auriana to help him get his mother out of harm’s way. Once they manage to pull the car onto solid ground, his mother gets out of the car and he embraces her.
